title: OMA Agent
description: An OMA-invocable agent. Unifies Claude subagents, Kiro agents, and CLI workers under a single vocabulary. Referenced from harness DSL and from SKILL.md frontmatter.

id.description: Agent identifier (kebab-case, unique within a plugin).

runtime.description: Where the agent runs. claude-code = native Claude Code subagent; kiro = Kiro .agent.json profile; cli = tmux-hosted CLI worker (claude/codex/gemini).

model.description: Model tier. Free-form so future Claude/Bedrock/OSS names remain valid without schema churn.

tier.description: OMA Tier-0/1/2 classification. Tier-0 is top-level workflows; Tier-1 is domain; Tier-2 is specialist.

mcp.description: MCP server ids this agent depends on. Ids are local to the plugin's DSL and resolved by oma-compile.

ontology.description: Inputs and outputs in terms of other ontology entities.

mcp_uri.description: Optional canonical MCP server URI (Model Context Protocol v1.0). Used when the agent invokes a hosted MCP service directly rather than via a pinned local uvx entry. Example: mcp://awslabs.eks-mcp-server.

model_tier.description: Optional model tier hint consumed by autopilot/agenticops for cost-aware routing. 'custom' escapes the Claude/OpenAI tier vocabulary.

entityRef.description: Deprecated local alias — prefer $ref to common/enums.schema.json#/$defs/entityRef. Kept for backward compatibility with external consumers that $ref agent.schema.json#/definitions/entityRef.
